title: Categorical frequency encodings
summary: Add target-free frequency encodings for stable categorical identifiers and race-context combinations.
rationale: Frequency features appeared in early strong baselines and many later stacks. They give AutoGluon compact information about category prevalence without target leakage.
implementation_hint: Normalize categoricals, then add frequency fractions for `Driver`, `Race`, `Compound`, `Year`, and `Race_Year` using the incoming combined feature frame. Optionally add log-frequency variants for high-cardinality interactions.
expected_effect: Small ROC AUC gain with medium confidence.
risk: Transductive frequencies use test feature distribution; this is target-free but may not match a strict online setting.
